fieldTrimTable.reason: primary column identity and rowIndex/column-order baseline
header label needed by all structured table branches
derivable and brittle in fixture
renderer/style policy; can be added by later display policy helper
style policy likely to change independently
classification only supports style, not core data
avoid confusion with actual rowIndex data column
derive from array position and avoid naming collision

fieldTrimTable.customNeed: not needed; editRows uses row index + key
fieldTrimTable.reason: would bloat fixtures and duplicate raw OCR values
cell identity for edit overlay and assertions
derive from columns; avoid repeated labels per cell
normalized canonical cell value before empty display replacement
captures '-' behavior without renderer logic
small stable semantic flag
same reason as columns.align
derive from row array
derive from cell array
cheap and useful manifest/body sanity
cheap and useful fixture sanity
clear guard for empty state
clear guard for empty state
derive easily; avoid fixture churn

alignWidthDecision.reason: _invoiceColWidth/_invoiceDataAlign are shared today but are style policy, not shared data. Keep them in renderer/display policy for now.

sourceRowDecision.reason: Custom edit write-back uses row index + col key; sourceRow duplicates raw input and bloats fixture.

duplicateDecision.indices: exclude; derive from array positions and avoid rowIndex naming collision

hasEmptyCellsDecision.reason: derive from rows[].cells[].isEmpty; not currently used as UI input

why: Fixture should lock shared data contract, not style policy.
Array positions provide indexes without serializing them.
Custom edit overlay uses row position + cell key; sourceRow is not required.

cleanJsonReuse.judgement: Clean JSON fixture는 보조 baseline으로만 사용하고 table_view_model_v1 fixture는 별도 필요
whyStillSeparate: Clean JSON rows는 object rows이고 view model rows는 cells array다.

fixtureInstruction3D1.bodyShape: StructuredTableViewModel only; metadata goes to manifest.json
fixtureInstruction3D1.rowCount: compare to known invoice expected rowCount
fixtureInstruction3D1.trade3Locked: record whether columns include insuranceCode/amount and preserve current behavior
fixtureInstruction3D1.cleanJsonAssist: compare key/value baseline with Clean JSON rows as supplemental check only
fixtureInstruction3D1.equality: deep equality on trimmed view model JSON

helperInstruction3D2.application: Prefer helper extraction + direct runner first; OcrResultPanel adoption may be same step only if fixture runner passes and diff remains tiny.
